Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions:
- User account exists in the system.
- Valid username and password are known.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `testuser` in the username field.
2. User enters `SecurePass123` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully logged in.
- System redirects to the `MenuLaterale` (Page 3).
- No error messages are displayed.

Title: Failed Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: - User account exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `testuser` in the username field.
2. User enters `WrongPass123` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Invalid username or password."
- User remains on the login screen.
- No redirection occurs.

Title: Admin Login as User
Preconditions:
- User account exists.
- Admin credentials are known.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `adminuser` in the username field.
2. User enters `AdminPass123` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- User logs in as an admin (Page 1: "User logs in as Admin").
- System grants admin privileges (e.g., access to admin-only features).
- No error messages are displayed.

Title: Logout Functionality
Preconditions: - User is currently logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to `MyProfile` (Page 3).
2. User clicks the "Logout" button.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully logged out.
- System redirects to the login screen.
- Session is terminated (no active user state).

Title: Successful User Registration
Preconditions: - System is accessible for new registrations.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Create User" (Page 10: `Main -> User -> DB`).
2. User enters `John Doe` in the name field.
3. User enters `john.doe@example.com` in the email field.
4. User enters `NewPass123` in the password field.
5. User clicks "Submit."
Expected Result:
- User account is created successfully.
- System confirms registration: "User created successfully."
- User is redirected to the login screen (Page 2: `creaUtente() -> login()`).

Title: Failed Registration with Duplicate Email
Preconditions: - Email `john.doe@example.com` already exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Create User."
2. User enters `John Doe` in the name field.
3. User enters `john.doe@example.com` in the email field.
4. User enters `NewPass123` in the password field.
5. User clicks "Submit."
Expected Result:
- System displays an error: "Email already registered."
- User remains on the registration screen.
- No new account is created.

Title: Registration with Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: - System enforces email format validation.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Create User."
2. User enters `John Doe` in the name field.
3. User enters `invalid.email` in the email field.
4. User enters `NewPass123` in the password field.
5. User clicks "Submit."
Expected Result:
- System displays an error: "Invalid email format."
- User remains on the registration screen.
- No new account is created.

Title: User Navigation Flow: Login → Menu → Profile → Logout
Preconditions: - User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in successfully (TC-AUTHENTICATION-001).
2. User navigates to `MenuLaterale` (Page 3).
3. User clicks "MyProfile" (Page 8: `Menu -> MyProfile`).
4. User clicks "Logout" (Page 3: `MyProfile -> Logout`).
Expected Result:
- User sees the `MenuLaterale` after login.
- User views their profile details.
- User is logged out successfully (TC-AUTHENTICATION-004).

Title: Navigation to Activities from Menu
Preconditions: - User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in successfully.
2. User navigates to `MenuLaterale`.
3. User clicks "MyActivities" (Page 3: `MenuLaterale -> MyActivities`).
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the `MyActivities` screen.
- User sees their activity history or list.
- No errors occur.

Title: View Noticeboard with Filter
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Noticeboard contains data.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to `ViewNoticeboard` (Page 5).
2. User selects "ListWithFilter."
3. User applies a filter (e.g., "Announcements from 2023").
Expected Result:
- System displays filtered noticeboard items.
- Filtered results match the applied criteria.
- No errors occur.

Title: View Noticeboard Details Without Filter
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Noticeboard contains data.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to `ViewNoticeboard`.
2. User selects "ListNoFilter."
3. User clicks on a noticeboard item to view details (Page 5: `ListNoFilter -> ListNoFilterDetails`).
Expected Result:
- System displays unfiltered noticeboard items.
- User sees detailed information for the selected item.
- No errors occur.

Title: Switch from No-Filter to Filtered Details
Preconditions: - User is viewing `ListNoFilterDetails`.
Test Steps:
1. User is on `ListNoFilterDetails`.
2. User clicks to view filtered details (Page 5: `ListNoFilterDetails -> ListWithFilterDetails`).
Expected Result:
- System displays filtered details for the selected noticeboard item.
- Filtered details match the applied criteria.
- No errors occur.

Title: Create a New Announcement
Preconditions: - User has admin privileges.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the announcement creation screen.
2. User clicks "Create" (Page 9: `Annucio -> create`).
3. User fills in announcement details (title, content, etc.).
4. User clicks "Submit."
Expected Result:
- Announcement is created successfully.
- System confirms creation: "Announcement created."
- New announcement appears in the noticeboard.

Title: Modify an Existing Announcement
Preconditions:
- User has admin privileges.
- An announcement exists.
Test Steps:
1. User selects an existing announcement.
2. User clicks "Modified" (Page 9: `Annucio -> modified`).
3. User updates the announcement details.
4. User clicks "Save."
Expected Result:
- Announcement is updated successfully.
- System confirms modification: "Announcement updated."
- Updated details reflect in the noticeboard.

Title: Remove an Announcement
Preconditions:
- User has admin privileges.
- An announcement exists.
Test Steps:
1. User selects an existing announcement.
2. User clicks "Removed" (Page 9: `Annucio -> removed`).
3. User confirms deletion.
Expected Result:
- Announcement is removed successfully.
- System confirms deletion: "Announcement removed."
- Announcement no longer appears in the noticeboard.

Title: Modify User Account Details
Preconditions: - User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to `MyProfile` (Page 8: `Menu -> MyProfile`).
2. User clicks "ModifyAccount" (Page 8: `MyProfile -> ModifyAccount`).
3. User updates name/email/password fields.
4. User clicks "Save."
Expected Result:
- Account details are updated successfully.
- System confirms update: "Profile updated."
- Changes reflect in the profile screen.

Title: Donate Points from Profile
Preconditions: - User has points to donate.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to `MyProfile`.
2. User clicks "PointsDonation" (Page 8: `ModifyAccount -> PointsDonation`).
3. User selects points to donate (e.g., 10 points).
4. User clicks "Confirm."
Expected Result:
- Points are donated successfully.
- System confirms donation: "Points donated."
- User's remaining points are updated.

Title: Save User Data to Database
Preconditions: - User registration is initiated.
Test Steps:
1. User creates a new account (TC-USER-REGISTRATION-001).
2. System saves data to `DB` (Page 10: `User -> DB`).
Expected Result:
- User data is saved to the database.
- No errors occur during persistence.
- Data is retrievable for future sessions.

Title: Insert Data into Database
Preconditions: - System is ready to insert data.
Test Steps: 1. `Main` component inserts data into `DB` (Page 14: `Main -> DB`).
Expected Result:
- Data is inserted successfully.
- No errors occur.
- Data is retrievable for future operations.
